session.task: Reverse conversation order in detail panel (most recent first) and add Load More pagination for transcript entries beyond 50

events.reason: The getAgentDetail function in agents.ts hardcodes `lines.slice(0, 50)` which only reads the first 50 lines. Need to: 1) Add offset/limit params to the detail API route, 2) Reverse the conversation array so newest entries come first, 3) Add Load More button in AgentDetailPanel, 4) Return totalTurns count for pagination.

Reversed conversation array in getAgentDetail so most recent transcript entries appear first. Added offset/limit params to the detail API route for pagination. Added Load More button in AgentDetailPanel that fetches next 50 entries and appends them. Updated TraceView header text to say 'Most recent activity first'.
